title: arenaria carinata
intro: Arenaria carinata, also known as sandwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Caryophyllaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation. The plant contains compounds like flavonoids and phenolic acids, which are known to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, providing health benefits such as reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Arenaria carinata is often used as a tincture, tea, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
